samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Multiplies two 8-bit operands using shift-and-add method.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">First 8-bit input operand (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Second 8-bit input operand (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output representing the product of the two 8-bit inputs (A * B).</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Initialize variables
        integer i;
        reg [15:0] product_reg = 16'd0;
        reg [7:0] multiplicand_reg = 8'd0;
        
        // Perform multiplication operation
        always @(*) begin
            multiplicand_reg = A;
            for(i = 0; i < 8; i = i + 1) begin
                if(B[i]) begin
                    product_reg = product_reg + (multiplicand_reg << i);
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Assign output
        assign product = product_reg;
    </implementation>
</module>
